jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Gati
jsonLd.description:
Join the Gati family as a Fleet Manager in Allahabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Gati:
Gati is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gati!
